channel.title: Posts on BLOG von Philipp L.

item.title: Interaction in Virtual and Augmented Reality 2025/26
item.description:
Implementing an interaction and locomotion project.

Skateboard XR

Introduction & Motivation

Introduction

This blog post documents a project for the lecture Interaction in Virtual and Augmented Reality (2025/26).

In this lecture, we learned a lot about VR, AR, and XR, as well as how to create engaging projects in this field. To receive a grade, we were required to design and implement a new locomotion technique and some kind of interaction task.
